title: Lesson 41
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: the skill or power to do something
words.example: Her ability to explain ideas is impressive.
The accident happened on a rainy road.

words.meaning: a set of rooms for living in, usually in a large building
words.example: They rent an apartment near the river.

words.meaning: a large organized group of soldiers
words.example: The army helped after the flood.

words.meaning: a business that keeps and lends money
words.example: I opened a new account at the bank.

words.meaning: an area of sand or stones beside the sea or a lake
words.example: We walked along the beach at sunset.

words.meaning: a structure with walls and a roof
words.example: The tallest building in town is a hotel.

words.meaning: the work someone does over many years
words.example: She wants a career in design.

words.meaning: a television station or a way for information to pass
words.example: This channel shows news every morning.

words.meaning: a picture or table that shows information
words.example: The chart shows sales for each month.
